videoSnippet.title: The Next Speed Demon || Alireza vs Arjun || Bullet Chess Championship FINAL 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Firouzja, Alireza (3330) - Erigaisi Arjun (3341)
Bullet Chess Championship 2026 (Chess.com) [04-23] 2026.06.26
A09 Reti opening

1.e4 c6 2.d4 d6 3.Nc3 g6 4.f4 Bg7 5.Nf3 Nf6 6.Bd3 O-O 7.O-O Nbd7 8.e5 Nd5 9.Nxd5 cxd5 10.Qe1 e6 11.c3 f6 12.exd6 Re8 13.b3 Bf8 14.Ba3 Qa5 15.Bb4 Qb6 16.c4 a5 17.Ba3 a4 18.c5 Qd8 19.b4 Nb8 20.b5 Bd7 21.Rc1 Bg7 22.Kh1 Kh8 23.Qe2 Rf8 24.Rfe1 Qe8 25.Rb1 Ra5 26.Rec1 Rg8 27.Qb2 Bh6 28.Qb4 Ra8 29.Qd2 Qc8 30.Re1 Qe8 31.Qe3 Ra5 32.Qd2 Ra8 33.Bc1 a3 34.Qc3 Ra4 35.f5 Bxc1 36.Qxc1 gxf5 37.Qc2 Ra5 38.Bxf5 Qf7 39.Bd3 Qg7 40.Re2 Qh6 41.Qd2 Qxd2 42.Rxd2 Ra4 43.h3 Rc8 44.Kh2 e5 45.dxe5 fxe5 46.Nxe5 Rxc5 47.Rf2 Be6 48.Rbf1 Kg7 49.Rf6 Nd7 50.Rxe6 Nxe5 51.Rxe5
